evals.name: Model Registry Methodology
evals.prompt:
Your team has trained a new version of a model and needs to register it, track its metadata, and promote it from development to production.

Describe your model registry methodology: how you register models, how versioning works, how you track artifacts with storage URIs, and how you promote models across environments.
evals.expected_output: A registry methodology covering model registration (RegisteredModel CR), versioning (ModelVersion CR), artifact tracking with S3 storage URIs (ModelArtifact CR), and cross-environment promotion (dev -> staging -> prod) using the OpenShift AI Model Registry.
assertions: The output describes registering models using RegisteredModel resources in the OpenShift AI Model Registry.
The output describes model versioning using ModelVersion resources linked to a registered model.
The output describes tracking model artifacts with storage URIs (e.g., S3 paths) using ModelArtifact resources.
The output describes promoting models across environments (dev -> staging -> production) as a registry workflow.
